ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the book */,
  "isbn_13" TEXT /* ISBN-13 number of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum inventory level that triggers a reorder */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., Hardcover, Paperback) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average ratings for the book */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the book */,
  "bookshelf" TEXT /* Physical location of the book within the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* Year of death (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "literary_awards" TEXT /* Notable literary awards the author has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* Sub-genres of the genre (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Opening and closing hours of the store */,
  "manager_since" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the store */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., square footage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES store_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the store manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store manager */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date the manager was employed */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous experience of the manager */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_managers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES store_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied (if any) */,
  "sales_associate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales associate who made the sale */,
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred the buyer */,
  "payment_details" TEXT /* Additional payment details (e.g., transaction ID, card type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_referral_id FOREIGN KEY ("referral_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_associate_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_associate_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "preferred_store" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred store */,
  "marketing_consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer consents to marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_store FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book at the time of sale */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "minimum_purchase_amount" REAL /* Minimum purchase amount required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount_amount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Unique discount code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier's supervisor */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store placing the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier receiving the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Delivered) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "shipment_tracking_number" TEXT /* Shipment tracking number */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Detailed delivery status (e.g., In Transit, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier order */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book at the time of order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES supplier_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of specific permissions associated with each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date the user was employed */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
